source_intake_record.raw_question_text: A DC distribution system is shown in <image> with load current as marked. The two ends of the feeder are fed by voltage sources such that \( V_P - V_Q = 3 \text{V} \). The value of the voltage \( V_P \) for a minimum voltage of 220 V at any point along the feeder is ________
